productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Brown Casual Shoes
description: This rugged pair from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and heavy duty durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish on rough terrain. You can team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperSuede uppers with nubuck overlays on the toe counter and around the collar for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing as a design element and for greater reinforcementLace-ups for snug FitPadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo tab on the sideAppliqued logo on the tongueMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceMulti-directional grooves for better gripFlex-grooves for better flexibility of the feetWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
